title: eryngium bupleuroides
intro: Eryngium bupleuroides, also known as sea holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eryngium bupleuroides include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
